final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original illustration of a cozy cat daily-life scene featuring an orange tabby cat on a windowsill (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 治愈系 (iyashikei / heartwarming) illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the orange tabby cat centered on the windowsill, indoor warmth contrasting snowy outdoor scene visible through the window
Subject: must include the orange tabby cat (one), lying/sprawled on the windowsill basking in light
Scene/backdrop: must include a cozy warm interior windowsill setting; must include a snowy winter street scene outside the window with falling snow
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, warm, heart-melting atmosphere — exact light source mix and warmth gradient are yours
Color palette: needs a warm-indoor vs. cool-snowy-outdoor contrast direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a fluffy, fuzzy, plush fur texture treatment that evokes softness — exact grain and rendering technique are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
